name: Selkirk AMPED S2
description: The Selkirk AMPED S2 delivers a balanced blend of power and control, making it an excellent choice for intermediate players looking to elevate their game. Its FiberFlex fiberglass face provides a responsive feel with consistent ball placement, while the X5 polypropylene honeycomb core absorbs vibration for comfortable extended play.
care_instructions: Wipe the paddle face with a damp cloth after play to remove ball residue. Avoid leaving the paddle in direct sunlight or extreme heat, as this can warp the core. Store in a paddle cover when not in use.
